div1.entryFree: Surmount, to surpass, to exceed: as I all other in all worths s. Sonn. 62, 8. this Hector far --ed Hannibal, LLL V, 2, 677. your presence makes us rich, . . . and far --s our labour to attain it, R2 II, 3, 64. Absol., == to be surpassing: bethink thee on her virtues that s., and natural graces that extinguish art, H6A V, 3, 191.
